Description

Grammar-based representation infrastructure.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.repr.grammar.eval
Tree evaluators for grammar-derived programs.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    double
    TreeEvaluator.evaluate(DerivationTree tree, EvaluationContext context)
    Evaluates tree to numeric output.

    TreeEvaluator.evaluateBoolean(DerivationTree tree, EvaluationContext context)
